units.source_text: Cash-based fixed remuneration is paid immediately.

units.source_text: Paid in HSBC shares. Vested shares are subject to a retention period of up to one year for executive Directors and where required by regulation.
units.translation_target_text: 以汇丰银行股票支付。执行董事以及根据法规要求，归属股份的保留期最长为一年。

units.source_text: each MRT the variable component of remuneration for any one year is limited to 10 times the fixed component of total remuneration, in line with the maximum
units.translation_target_text: 每个 MRT 任何一年的薪酬可变部分限制为总薪酬固定部分的 10 倍，符合最高限额

units.source_text: pay ratio approved by the Group Remuneration Committee. HSBC Holdings plc continues to provide approval for entities regulated by the European Banking
units.translation_target_text: 薪酬比例由集团薪酬委员会批准。汇丰控股有限公司继续为受欧洲银行业监管的实体提供批准

units.source_text: Authority to operate a maximum variable pay ratio of 200% of the fixed component of total remuneration for each MRT, where permitted to do so.
units.translation_target_text: 在允许的情况下，有权对每项 MRT 实行最高浮动工资率为总薪酬固定部分 200% 的比例。

units.source_text: 28 identified staff members were exempt from the application of the remuneration structure requirements for MRTs under the PRA and FCA remuneration rules.
units.translation_target_text: 根据 PRA 和 FCA 薪酬规则，28 名确定的工作人员免于适用 MRT 薪酬结构要求。
